---
title: "extend_to_size"
generated: true
description: "Extend a tensor in the positive direction until its size matches the specification. Any new entries created via extension are populated with `fill`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.numerics.tensor_ops`](../nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix._internal.util`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:extend_to_size -->
```python
extend_to_size(tensor: Shaped[Array, ...], shape: Sequence[int], fill: float = float('nan')) -> Shaped[Array, ...]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:extend_to_size -->
Extend a tensor in the positive direction until its size matches the
specification. Any new entries created via extension are populated with
`fill`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:extend_to_size -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `tensor` | `Shaped[Array, ...]` | — | — | — |
| `shape` | `Sequence[int]` | — | — | — |
| `fill` | `float` | — | `float('nan')` | — |

**Returns** `Shaped[Array, ...]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
